title: Ore Veines+
description: Vanilla & Modded ore veines+ adds Iron, Emerald, diamond, netherite veins. and more!
body:
![veines](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71e2b502724ea4371e6c33678c4a7245f5377ad8.png)

**⛏️ Ore Veines+**

Take full control over how ores generate in your world.
Ore Veines+ allows you to completely customize ore generation — for both vanilla and modded ores.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**⚙️ Fully Configurable**

Easily tweak every detail of ore generation through the config:


**modpack > config > ore_veines > ore_veins_overrides**

Change vein sizes
Adjust spawn height (min/max Y)
Control spawn attempts
Enable or disable specific ores
Support for multiple dimensions (Overworld, Nether, etc.)

**Showcase:**

```
{
  "global": {
    "enabled": true,
    "vein_size_multiplier": 0.85,
    "attempt_multiplier": 1.0,
    "nether_generation_enabled": true,
    "auto_discover_modded_ores": true,
    "auto_enable_discovered_modded_ores": true,
    "debug_logging": false
  },
  "overrides": {
    "minecraft:coal_ore": {
      "enabled": true,
      "vein_size": 36,
      "attempts": 1,
      "min_y": 48,
      "max_y": 160,
      "dimension": "overworld"
```
![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**🌍 Works with Everything**

✅ Supports vanilla ores
✅ Automatically detects modded ores
✅ Compatible with modpacks

The mod can even auto-discover and enable modded ores, making setup super easy.

💬 Support & Compatibility

Having issues or a mod not working correctly?

👉 Join our Discord and submit a mod compatibility request
We actively improve support for more mods!
[DISCORD](https://discord.gg/V2MqnY7Za3)

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**🔥 Smart & Flexible System**

Global multipliers for vein size and spawn attempts
Per-ore overrides for precise control
Biome-based generation support
Clean and optimized configuration system

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)



![intelji](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#AD
